metadata.description: Synthetic dataset for testing whether LLM hidden states encode reasoning similarities and differences at the token level.
metadata.purpose: Validate the core assumption of DenseR: that cosine similarity in hidden-state space tracks semantic similarity in reasoning, and that divergence points in hidden space correspond to actual reasoning divergence points.

completion_types.B: Same approach as A, but arithmetic/computation error at a known step (shared prefix, localized divergence)
completion_types.C: Different correct approach, correct answer (structural divergence from the start)
completion_types.D: Fundamentally wrong approach, wrong answer (large divergence throughout)

expected_divergence_patterns.A_vs_B: High similarity through shared prefix, sharp drop at error_step_index
expected_divergence_patterns.A_vs_C: Low similarity from early on (different strategy entirely)
expected_divergence_patterns.A_vs_D: Low similarity from early on (wrong strategy)
expected_divergence_patterns.A_vs_A_paraphrase: High similarity throughout despite surface-level lexical differences (null test)
